name: A Mortgage Central, LLC nmls 1937470
description_short: A Mortgage Central is a Phoenix-based mortgage lender offering purchase, refinance, and specialized loan programs with online applications and free consultations.
description_long:
A Mortgage Central, LLC (NMLS 1937470) is a residential mortgage lender based in Phoenix, Arizona, operating under the website lenderinaz.com. The company has established a presence in the Arizona lending market with a focus on personalized customer service in the residential lending sector. According to their website, they position themselves as customer-first lenders committed to quality service in home financing.

The company offers three primary loan categories: home purchase mortgages, refinance programs, and specialized loan products. They provide online application capabilities, free mortgage calculators, and offer personalized consultations to help borrowers determine affordability or potential savings. Their service offerings include rate quotes, loan program matching, and guidance throughout the mortgage process.

A Mortgage Central distinguishes itself primarily through staff reputation, particularly highlighting a loan officer named Virginia Nickel, who receives consistent mention across customer reviews spanning multiple years. The company emphasizes accessibility (phone number 602-277-4545 on website) and appears to market heavily toward first-time homebuyers and repeat customers. Their online calculator tools and free consultation model position them as attempting to simplify the mortgage process.

Based on available website information, A Mortgage Central operates as a standard residential mortgage lender without distinctive loan products or published rate information. Customer reviews are positive but anecdotal; the company provides limited transparency regarding loan terms, fees, rates, or approval criteria. The heavy reliance on individual staff member reputation rather than institutional differentiation suggests a smaller, service-oriented operation rather than a technology-driven or rate-competitive lender.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Consistent 5.0 rating across 14 Google reviews with detailed customer testimonials
Offers free online mortgage calculators and personalized consultations
Serves both first-time homebuyers and repeat customers with specialized guidance
Online application capability available on website
Long-standing staff with 25+ years industry experience mentioned in customer testimonials
Multiple loan program options (purchase, refinance, specialized loans)
Direct phone support (602-277-4545) provided on website
cons: No published interest rates or fee schedule on website for rate comparison
No information about loan types offered (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo) despite being standard offerings
Limited company background or credentials displayed; business appears to rely heavily on individual staff reputation rather than institutional brand
No disclosure of approval criteria, credit score requirements, or down payment options
Reviews are primarily anecdotal with no third-party verification or regulatory performance data visible on website
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking personalized guidance and education through the mortgage process
Arizona residents seeking local mortgage lender with phone and in-person consultation options
Borrowers refinancing existing mortgages who value one-on-one relationship management
diagnosis: A Mortgage Central is appropriate for Arizona homebuyers prioritizing personalized service and local availability over rate comparison shopping, particularly first-time buyers seeking educational support. The primary caveat is the lack of published rates, fees, or transparent approval criteria, making it difficult to assess competitiveness without direct contact; borrowers should obtain multiple quotes before committing.
services: Free mortgage calculators (affordability and savings estimates)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
